title: alchemilla vulgaris subvar. trunciloba
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subvar. trunciloba, commonly known as the alpine lady's mantle, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris subvar. trunciloba include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat skin conditions, digestive issues, and other health problems.
